Defendant Ferrellgas, Lp, Ferrellgas, Inc.'S Motion To Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice I
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. MICHAEL C. MCMULLEN, ESQ.'S VERIFIED APPLICATION TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE for Defendants Ferrellgas Inc And Ferrellgas L.P. is granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. (The court will sign the proposed order that was emailed to the court.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT FERRELLGAS, LP, FERRELLGAS, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is Continued on the court's own motion to January 22, 2013 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than January 11, 2013 at 4 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)
